title: hemionitis leachii
intro: Hemionitis leachii, also known as the Leach's chain fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Hemionitis leachii is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion. It is often prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies such as infusions and ointments.
intro_study: According to the "Journal of research in pharmacy practice", Hemionitis leachii, part of the HemoHIM mixture, had beneficial effects in preventing the occurrence of ventilator-associated pneumonia and significantly reduced the incidence of pneumonia in the intervention group.
